mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
mapper.sql: SELECT JOIN_NO , b.USER_ID , b.CATEGORY , b.PARTICIPANTS , b.REGION , b.START_DATE , b.END_DATE , b.TITLE , b.CONTENT , b.CREATE_DATE , count(*) current_count FROM JOIN_BOARD b JOIN JOIN_REQUEST r USING(JOIN_NO) WHERE b.DELETED = 'N' and r.STATUS = 'ACCEPTED'
GROUP BY JOIN_NO , b.USER_ID , b.CATEGORY , b.PARTICIPANTS , b.REGION , b.START_DATE , b.END_DATE , b.TITLE , b.CONTENT , b.CREATE_DATE
mapper.select:
AND b.CATEGORY = 'PLANT'
ORDER BY JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
AND b.CATEGORY = 'PLOG' ORDER BY JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE JOIN_BOARD SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
